name: HUBBELL INC
summary: PART I Hubbell Incorporated (herein referred to as Hubbell, the Company, the registrant, we, our or us, which references shall include its divisions and subsidiaries as the context may require) was founded as a proprietorship in 1888, and was incorporated in Connecticut in 1905. Recognized for our innovation, quality, and deep commitment to serving our customers for over 135 years, Hubbell is a world-class manufacturer of electrical and utility solutions, with more than 75 brands used around the...
